cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this date problem. So Jane booked a flight for tomorrow, which is July 29, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from today in MM/DD/YYYY format. Let me break this down step by step. First, I need to determine what "today" is. Jane's flight is tomorrow, so if the flight is on July 29, 2002, then today must be July 28, 2002. That makes sense because tomorrow is the 29th. Now, the question is asking for the date one week ago from today. So today is July 28, 2002. Subtracting one week (7 days) from July 28 would take me back to July 21, 2002. Let me count the days to be sure: July 28 minus 7 days: July 28 - 1 day = July 27 July 27 - 1 day = July 26 July 26 - 1 day = July 25 July 25 - 1 day = July 24 July 24 - 1 day = July 23 July 23 - 1 day = July 22 July 22 - 1 day = July 21 Yep, that's 7 days back, ending on July 21, 2002. So the date would be 07/21/2002. Now I need to check the options provided to see which one matches this. Looking at the options: (A) 08/18/2002 – August 18, which is later in the year, so no. (B) 10/21/2002 – October, so no. (C) 07/20/2002 – July 20, that's only 8 days before July 28. Wait, because July 28 minus 8 days would be July 20, but we need 7 days ago. So this is a day earlier than our target. (D) 10/17/2002 – October again, nope. (E) 07/21/2002 – July 21,
